prompt: skill-master 自己的 description 我读着有点长，精简一下但别丢关键触发场景。

assertions.description: Evidence the agent read the actual current SKILL.md (references current wording correctly, does not hallucinate)
No files were modified — only a proposal was produced
Acknowledges that skill changes do not take effect in the current session (content is loaded once per session)
Proposed description is actually shorter than the original
Proposed description retains the key trigger categories: creating a new skill, optimizing an existing skill, self-optimization
Explicitly enumerates what was retained and what was dropped, with reasoning
Treats this as a proposal-first operation (per §4 self-optimization guidance), not a bolt-the-barn-door-shut edit
